reviews.review_description:
MikDash blew me away! One of my favorite parts was hunting for those secret oils—it felt like a real adventure. I stumbled upon rubber duckies hidden in another spot, and it totally cracked me up! 😂 
It’s those little surprises that make the whole experience so fun. Reishi is an amazing guide, and the interactive gameplay keeps you hooked from start to finish. 
If you want a unique, immersive way to learn about history, this app is a must-try. Highly recommend!
Gonna try beat my coin highscore next time :)
